creator: khng@freebsd.org
text:
diff --git chinese/fcitx-rime/Makefile chinese/fcitx-rime/Makefile
index a7028bd92219..b46c0bf46d41 100644
--- chinese/fcitx-rime/Makefile
+++ chinese/fcitx-rime/Makefile
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ CATEGORIES=     chinese
 MASTER_SITES=  http://download.fcitx-im.org/${PORTNAME}/
 DIST_SUBDIR=   fcitx

-MAINTAINER=    lichray@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=    khng300@gmail.com
 COMMENT=       RIME support for Fcitx

 LICENSE=       GPLv2
diff --git chinese/librime/Makefile chinese/librime/Makefile
index f40d54bbb91c..311d43e52f4b 100644
--- chinese/librime/Makefile
+++ chinese/librime/Makefile
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ PORTNAME=       librime
 PORTVERSION=   1.6.1
 CATEGORIES=    chinese textproc

-MAINTAINER=    lichray@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=    khng300@gmail.com
 COMMENT=       Rime Input Method Engine, the core library

 LICENSE=       GPLv3
